title: Dice Dreams™
notes:
Thanks for playing Dice Dreams! We are working hard to improve the game with every release.

In this version, we've added a variety of updates and improvements to enhance your experience.

We hope you enjoy the game!

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer has arrived in Hopewell Bay, and there's plenty to look forward to in our latest update!

• Maddie and her friends are gearing up for an exciting soccer watch party.
• Discover and restore the Hallway of Curiosities, our newest area filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.
• Enjoy a lineup of fun seasonal events and brand-new Season Passes packed with rewards.
• We've also made a variety of improvements and fixes to keep your experience running smoothly.

See you in Hopewell Bay!

title: RAID: Shadow Legends
notes:
New in 11.65.0:

FEATURES:
- Added the Win Streak mode in Live Arena & improved Live Arena matchmaking
- Added Quick Battle option to Chimera Battles
- Added 40 new Gemstones, earned from Live Arena
- Introduced the ability to assign duplicate Mythical Champions as Faction Guardians in the Guardian Ring
- Rebalanced the Plarium Points Program so users can progress faster
- Increased the chances of summoning Perfect Souls for specific Champions in the Altar of Souls' Wishlist
- Champion rebalance

title: Free Fire MAX
notes:
[9th Anniversary] New 3D party lobby, themed rewards, and more ways to celebrate with friends!
[Themed BR] Factory becomes a limited-time anniversary venue. Anniversary quests, zone upgrades, and on-site revival await.
[Skill Boost] Some skills now feature new upgrade paths.
[Other Updates] BR-Ranked gets post-match review, BR areas get clearer loot indicators, and CS adds Perk Points.

title: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
notes:
NEW PACKS WITH FRESH LEVELS!

Jun 22 - SACRED ODYSSEY Pack: Walk among ancient temples, embark on a heroic quest, and explore 100 mythical levels! 
Jul 06 - WEEKEND ROAD TRIP Pack: Pack your suitcase, fuel up your vehicle, and explore 100 adventurous levels!
Jul 20 - TATAMI ROOM Pack: Embrace timeless rituals, discover hidden beauty, and explore 100 harmonious levels!

And don't miss the new TREASURE PASS season starting July 1!

Update regularly so you never miss fresh levels, events & surprise
